input: {"command": "node -e 'const p=[0,0.4,0.9,1.1], t=[0,1,2,3]; const v=[]; for(let i=0;i<t.length-1;i++) v.push((p[i+1]-p[i])/(t[i+1]-t[i])); const a=[]; for(let i=0;i<v.length-1;i++) a.push((v[i+1]-v[i])/(t[i+2]-t[i+1])); console.log(JSON.stringify({velocities:v, accel_changes:a, jerk_proxy:(a[1]-a[0])/(t[2]-t[1]), max_v:Math.max(...v), max_abs_a:Math.max(...a.map(Math.abs))}, null, 2));'"}
label: positive
